name: Mulligan Masters Indoor Golf Club
about: Mulligan Masters Indoor Golf Club is an indoor golf venue focused on providing accurate ball and club data insights through advanced technology. The venue offers a space for golfers to play tour courses and mini games, either individually or in groups. Operating on an appointment basis, the club provides flexible hours throughout the week to accommodate various schedules.
why_golfers_like_it: Most accurate ball and club data insights in the industry
Ability to play famous tour courses and mini games
Flexible scheduling with 7-day-a-week availability by appointment
Technology-focused environment for serious practice and fun

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue mentions club rentals, suggesting you may not need to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has food available on-site, but there's no specific mention of a BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify the time required for 18 holes, but playing by appointment suggests flexible timing.

faq.question: Is Mulligan Masters kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly as it promotes 'Fun For Everyone!' and mentions playing by yourself or bringing a group.
